other_observers: Larry Semo, Randy Seibert, Bruce Wild;
description: This bird had a long, blackish bill. The back was dark brown. The dark black streaks on the bird was on the breast, belly, and also a little on the undertail covert. It had gray on the face.Behaviors: The bird was digging and scratching on the ground, mostly in some tall grass and a few times it flew over to the fish pond. It usually was in bushes or tall grass, but a few times it was out in the open in the yard.Call: I never heard itPlumage: unknown
